caption: A man with a bald head and grey beard, wearing a grey polo shirt and a red identification badge, is the central focus in an indoor exhibition or conference setting. Behind him stands another man wearing glasses and a grey button-down shirt with a blue identification badge. In the background, white display panels feature the word "Hessenus" and a yellow banner with the text "Innovation" and "high resolution." Other people are visible in the distance, including a person sitting at a table and another standing near a white chair. As the sequence progresses, the man in the foreground shifts his gaze slightly and adjusts his facial expression. The camera remains steady, capturing the men from the chest up, while the surrounding environment of booths and trade show equipment remains static.
